Herbie’s Law Campaign

Story published on: April 27, 2026

I joined campaigners & experts to add my support to the Herbie’s Law campaign for animal free research in the UK.

I support the phase out of animal testing & welcomed the UK Labour Government’s plan for this published last year.

Read more about Herbie’s Law https://bit.ly/4tviDNP
